title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 1–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Big Mom, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AAAA- Arrghh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kyo- Shiro!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We sincerely apologize, Master Sasaki!! We can't believe you were tied up this whole time!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: .....pretty stupid, right? to think I was betrayed by one of my closest friends....

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Anyway, BIG MOM DID ALL THIS!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes, she was rampaging inside the dome....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What sort of power does she have, for it to reach us all the way out here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Though thanks to her, the sacred tree was taken down and set me loose.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kyoshiro has already infiltrated the castle... so he was one of oden's retainers...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care about Wano's history, but I'll make sure he pays for betraying me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: .....and why exactly is it so noisy up there......?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: SIR!! That is where Master Kaido is......

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Huff

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Huff

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Wait!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kin'Emon.......!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: InU!! neko!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That damned Hyogoro is here too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These guys are definitely the group that was imprisoned in Udon....!! What the hell happened in the mines!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And to top it all off, that damned strawhat is leading them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At this point I've already set my expecta- Tions so low for you,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You're going too far, you bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Was Babanuki being held hostage or something!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No problems here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: SOME- THING FEELS OFF...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: atten- lion.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Click click

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Flying Six!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 28 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
